zh.lifeSummary: 當Warin de Munchensy於大約1195年出生在英國時，他的父親William de Munchensy45歲，母親Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex36歲。他於大約1222年與Joan Marshal在威爾士布洛可爾布洛可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1255年7月20日在英國享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Warin de Munchensy于大约1195年出生在英国时，他的父亲William de Munchensy45岁，母亲Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex36岁。他于大约1222年与Joan Marshal在威尔士布洛可爾布洛可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1255年7月20日在英国享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Warin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Warin de Munchensy was born about 1195, in England, his father, William de Munchensy, was 45 and his mother, Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex, was 36. He married Joan Marshal about 1222, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 20 July 1255, in England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Warin de Munchensy est né environ 1195, à Angleterre, son père, William de Munchensy, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Joan Marshal environ 1222, à Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 20 juillet 1255, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Warin de Munchensy um 1195 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Munchensy 45 und seine Mutter Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex 36. Er hat um 1222 in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales Joan Marshal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 20. Juli 1255 im Alter von 61 Jahren in England.

Lui sposato Joan Marshal circa 1222, nel Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 20 luglio 1255, nel England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Warin de Munchensyが約1195年にイギリスで生まれた時，父William de Munchensyは45歳，母Aveline de Clare Countess of Essexは36歳であった。約1222年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロクでJoan Marshalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1255年7月20日にイギリスで61歳で死去した。

ko.of Tonbridge Castle, Tonbridge, Kent, En: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 토브리지 토브리지 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Warin de Munchensy(이)가 대략 1195년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Munchensy(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1222년 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 Joan Marshal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1255년 7월 20일 영국에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.of Tonbridge Castle, Tonbridge, Kent, En: Tonbridge Castle, Tonbridge, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Warin de Munchensy nasceu aproximadamente 1195, em Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Munchensy, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Marshal aproximadamente 1222, em Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 20 de julho de 1255, em Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.of Tonbridge Castle, Tonbridge, Kent, En: тонбридж кастл, тонбридж, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Warin de Munchensy родился около 1195 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени William de Munchensy было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Marshal около 1222 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 20 июля 1255 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 61 год.

Se casó con Joan Marshal aproximadamente 1222, en Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 20 de julio de 1255, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
